title: 皐月賞の後に・二代の雪辱

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Victory at the Satsuki Sho had always been out of
reach for the Mejiros... But today is different.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright finishes first! Within the long, long
history of the Mejiro family, they've finally
received the Satsuki Sho crown!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! Bright, Bright, Briiiight!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're incredible, just incredible... I swear it,
you're amazing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ryan... Are you really this happy? You're going to make me... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer, Ryan... Thank you for watching me race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Today, I was finally able to bring light to the
Mejiros and help Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Help me? What do you mean, Bright?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Mejiro Ryan about Mejiro Bright's secret
goal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see. I'm really thankful, Bright, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You never had to carry that burden. If you carry
too much on your shoulders, you'll end up like I
did.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Like you did?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I think the reason I didn't do well at the
Triple Crown was because I had too much on my
mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's why you have to run for yourself. That's the
best way you can run for the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Run to make yourself happy. That's more
important than anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah... Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I... I really love you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wha?! I mean, I'm really happy to hear
that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, do your best at the Japanese Derby!
That means you too, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Of course. Let's all do our best!
Of course. Let's all do our best!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby... I still can't see the path
before me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Should I continue running the way I have been?
Or...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright ran the Satsuki Sho to make up for
what happened in the past. But the Japanese
Derby...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Will be a fight for the future.
